  Rajasthan government to establish Keshav Vidhyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya in
  Jaipur, positioning it as the first organization to take up the state's offer
  for private universities in the desert state. No deeper analysis or

**By praba**

* * *

The Rashatriya Swayam Sevak Sangh (RSS) got the green signal from Rajasthan government yesterday to open an university – Keshav Vidhyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya in Jaipur. The culture nationalism asserting organisation is the first one to grab the offer for private universities to takeoff in this desert state. Read more in the Indian Express
